message:
feat: add connection module, refine FTS5 and Windows VFS

crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:
  Implement core database connection management with prepared
  statement caching and transaction state tracking.

crates/fsqlite-ext-fts5/src/lib.rs:
  Continue FTS5 tokenizer and query processor refinements.

crates/fsqlite-vfs/src/windows.rs:
  Expand Windows VFS with additional file operation stubs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
